column1: # DOLCHEO+ encoding TSV — schema per canon/governance/writing-conventions.md
# D, L, C rows (6 cols): type

column2: Adopt a three-tier deploy model on Cloudflare Workers Builds (one project per worker)
column3: prod (production branch -> transcode-mcp, full stack, class AudioContainer) and staging (staging branch -> transcode-mcp-staging, full stack, distinct class AudioContainerStaging, own bucket transcode-mcp-audio-staging). Deploys ALWAYS go through Cloudflare Workers Builds (CF dashboard connected to GitHub via githooks), one project per worker — NEVER GitHub Actions (durable operator preference). Per-branch previews are container-less by design (no container application, so no DO-class collision; audio passthrough), but the Workers-Builds-native per-branch unique-naming mechanism is unverified, so previews are DEFERRED; prod + staging are the committed tiers.
column4: wrangler.toml parses with prod + [env.staging] (prod class AudioContainer, staging class AudioContainerStaging, own bucket); src/worker.ts exports both classes; typecheck clean, 86 tests pass; the GitHub Actions deploy workflow was removed.
column5: GitHub Actions deploys (rejected: operator deploys exclusively via Workers Builds + githooks). Single [env.preview] worker (rejected: PR2 overwrites PR1). One shared config deployed twice with a runtime bucket branch (rejected: worker should not know its environment).
column6: implementing — prod + staging ready to wire as two Workers Builds projects; previews deferred pending Workers-Builds-native verification

column2: Branch previews must be container-less to scale to N
column3: Because a Cloudflare container application is keyed on the DO class name, every per-branch worker that declared a container would try to own an app for the same class and collide; per-branch distinct classes do not scale (unbounded classes/migrations). Resolution: previews bind NO container/DO and rely on the worker existing passthrough fallback (transcode requires AUDIO_CONTAINER+AUDIO_BUCKET, absent on previews). Trades live per-branch audio (validated on staging) for unlimited cheap disposable previews.
column4: src/worker.ts passthrough guard at the AUDIO_CONTAINER/AUDIO_BUCKET check; [env.preview] has no containers/durable_objects/migrations/r2_buckets.
column5: Per-branch container with per-branch DO class (rejected: unbounded). Per-branch container sharing prod class (rejected: collision).

column2: Deploy mechanism is Cloudflare Workers Builds + githooks, never GitHub Actions
column3: The operator deploys exclusively through Cloudflare Workers Builds (dashboard connected to GitHub via githooks), which builds + deploys on Cloudflare infra. No GitHub Actions deploys, no GitHub repo secrets for Cloudflare — prior deploys never needed CF secrets because Workers Builds authenticates on the Cloudflare side. A GitHub Actions deploy workflow was drafted and then removed once this was corrected; recorded in memory to stop recurring.
column4: Prior deploy logs are Cloudflare Workers Builds (/opt/buildhome/...); operator correction 2026-06-02; .github/workflows/deploy.yml removed.
column5: GitHub Actions deploy workflow (rejected and removed).
